skip_bet: In the past 12 months, have you participated in any of the following activities? (Select all that apply)
gsas_1: If you had unwanted urges to gamble during the past WEEK, on average, how strong were your urges?
gsas_2: During the past WEEK, how many times did you experience urges to gamble?
gsas_3: During the past WEEK, how many hours (add up hours) were you preoccupied with your urges to gamble?
gsas_4: During the past WEEK, how much were you able to control your urges?
gsas_5: During the past WEEK, how often did thoughts about gambling and placing bets come up?
gsas_6: During the past WEEK, approximately how many hours (add up hours) did you spend thinking about gambling and thinking about placing bets?
gsas_7: During the past WEEK, how much were you able to control your thoughts of gambling?
gsas_8: During the past WEEK, approximately how much total time did you spend gambling or on gambling related activities?
gsas_9: During the past WEEK, on average, how much anticipatory tension and/or excitement did you have shortly before you engaged in gambling? If you did not actually gamble, please estimate how much tension and/or excitement you believe you would have experienced, if you had gambled.
gsas_10: During the past WEEK, on average, how much excitement and pleasure did you feel when you won on your bet. If you did not actually win at gambling, please estimate how much excitement and pleasure you would have experienced, if you had won.
gsas_11: During the past WEEK how much emotional distress (mental pain or anguish, shame, guilt, embarrassment) has your gambling caused you?
gsas_12: During the past WEEK how much personal trouble (relationship, financial, legal, job, medical or health) has your gambling caused you?
bbgs_1: During the past 12 months did you have such financial trouble as a result of your gambling that you had to get help with living expenses from family, friends or welfare?
bbgs_2: During the past 12 months, have you become restless, irritable or anxious when trying to stop/cut down on gambling?
bbgs_3: During the past 12 months, have you tried to keep your family or friends from knowing how much you gambled?

audit_1: How often do you have a drink containing alcohol?

audit_8: How often during the last year have you been unable to remember what happened the night before because of your drinking?
